reasoning: Based on direct Wikipedia confirmation that Paul Biedermann holds the 200m freestyle world record (1:42.00 since July 28, 2009). The record has stood for 16+ years, making it resilient but not unbreakable. Probability decreases with forecast horizon: 0.92 for Nov 2 (only 7 days), 0.88 for Nov 25 (1 month, off-season), 0.82 for Jan 24, 2026 (3 months, still off-season). The short forecast window and off-season timing make record-breaking unlikely, though recent 2025 record-breaking activity shows it's still possible at major meets.
